text.title: Vendor Evaluation Scorecard for AI Tooling Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Are there ≥2 realistic vendors AND contract value ≥ $1k/yr?

conclusion.verdict: Skip rubric; document the single-vendor decision separately.
Sub-$1k contract — overhead not worth it.

branch.when: multi_vendor == true AND contract_value_per_year_usd >= 1000 AND weights_set == false

conclusion.verdict: Set weights first; do NOT score until weights are committed.

branch.when: multi_vendor == true AND contract_value_per_year_usd >= 1000 AND weights_set == true

conclusion.verdict: Run full scorecard with five-axis scoring + exit-cost.

example.trace: multi_vendor=true → contract=$15k/yr → weights_set=true → full scorecard run.
